title: Verical Item Frame
description: A resource pack that changes a way how item frames displays items
body:
Transform your Minecraft experience with the Verical Item Frame resource pack! This pack changes how items displayed in item frames, allowing you to place items and blocks in a unique orientation for better aesthetics and enhanced creativity. Perfect for building detailed interiors, creating immersive displays, or just adding a new twist to your Minecraft world.

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d41e836f93ebc336dd82008cc4de5aa003b386dd.png)
